matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $read = (Get-Counter '\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Avg. Disk sec/Read').CounterSamples[0].CookedValue; $write = (Get-Counter '\PhysicalDisk(_Total)\Avg. Disk sec/Write').CounterSamples[0].CookedValue; [pscustomobject]@{ avg_disk_sec_read = [math]::Round($read, 4); avg_disk_sec_write = [math]::Round($write, 4) } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
